title: Cooking with Father
theme: a father and son making dinner together

sentences.text: "What are we eating tonight?" Ben asks his father.
"We can cook rice and fish," his father answers.
sentences.gloss: “我们可以做米饭和鱼。”爸爸回答。

sentences.text: Ben wants to help, so he washes the rice in cold water.
sentences.gloss: 本想帮忙，就用冷水把米洗干净。

sentences.text: His father cuts the fish with a very sharp knife.
sentences.gloss: 爸爸用一把很锋利的刀切鱼。

sentences.text: "Please be careful," Ben says in a quiet voice.
They put the food on the fire and wait ten minutes.
sentences.gloss: 他们把食物放到火上，等了十分钟。

sentences.text: Soon the room smells good, and Ben feels very hungry.
sentences.gloss: 很快屋里就香了，本觉得很饿。

sentences.text: "You are a good cook," his father says with a laugh.
